svg.title: Geofencing Flowchart 01 - Improved Bypass Risk
svg.desc: Improved high-definition geofencing bypass-risk SVG with centered text, protected icon zones, and clean animated packet flow.

text.tspan: Clean flow view: the protected website sees the final public source while upstream routing stays concealed
Country-only IP geofencing is not enough. Also evaluate ASN, VPN/proxy reputation, device trust, identity, and session behaviour.
No icons or dots cross text areas.
The target sees a Pakistani IP.
